overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street at night. The scene features futuristic glass architecture, holographic advertisements, wet reflective pavement, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

player character begins walking forward following a pedestrian in a red jacket

pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead of the player character

pedestrian crossing signal displaying yellow walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked futuristic intersection at night, with neon reflections on the wet asphalt. A yellow sports car passes through the intersection as the player character begins walking, following a pedestrian in a red jacket. Tall glass office towers and digital billboards dominate the background while street lights illuminate the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with autoparts store and overhead walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the sidewalk alongside the autoparts building, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent vertical green AUTOPARTS signage
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a large building with vertical AUTOPARTS signage illuminated in green. An overhead pedestrian bridge is visible in the distance connecting the buildings. The street remains wet with reflective surfaces, and sparse pedestrian traffic moves in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with purple neon storefronts

events.description: entering area with prominent purple neon lighting on building facades

agents.ego_description: walking past storefronts with vibrant purple neon lighting and digital displays, passing pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the player in the opposite direction

entered.detail: building storefront with bright purple neon strip lighting and dark entrance
standing digital billboard display on the sidewalk showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a section of the street dominated by vibrant purple neon lighting on the left side of the walkway. The character passes digital advertising kiosks and other pedestrians while walking along the wet pavement. Sparse trees and street furniture appear along the sidewalk as the environment becomes more densely commercial.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with holographic displays and kiroshi optics signage

events.description: passing large blue holographic statue advertisement on the left sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street past the holographic display, with the Kiroshi building visible on the right

entered.detail: large blue glowing holographic advertisement display showing a human figure
building with illuminated KIROSHI OPTICS signage in both english and japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a striking blue holographic statue advertisement on the left sidewalk, glowing brightly against the dark surroundings. The character walks toward the Kiroshi Optics building on the right, identifiable by its prominent signage. The street continues with wet reflective surfaces and neon lighting from various storefronts and billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection that evolves into a densely commercial neon corridor. It begins at a wet asphalt crossing where a yellow sports car passes by and the character follows a pedestrian in a red jacket beneath towering glass office buildings and digital billboards. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a concrete sidewalk flanked by a building with glowing green AUTOPARTS signage and a distant overhead pedestrian bridge. The environment then transitions into a more vibrant commercial zone, where the lighting shifts to deep purple hues as the camera passes digital advertising kiosks and sparse street greenery. Finally, the path opens up to reveal a striking blue holographic statue on the left before the character approaches the prominent signage of the Kiroshi Optics building.
